title: Geode Feature
description: Generates a rock formation to simulate a geode with multiple configurable layers.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

filler.description: The block to fill the inside of the geode.

inner_layer.description: The block that forms the inside layer of the geode shell.

alternate_inner_layer.description: Optional. The block that has a chance of generating instead of inner_layer.

middle_layer.description: The block that forms the middle layer of the geode shell.

outer_layer.description: The block that forms the outer shell of the geode.

inner_placements.description: Optional. Blocks to place inside the geode.

min_outer_wall_distance.description: The minimum distance each distribution point must be from the outer wall.

max_outer_wall_distance.description: The maximum distance each distribution point can be from the outer wall.

min_distribution_points.description: The minimum number of points inside the distance field that can get generated.

max_distribution_points.description: The maximum number of points inside the distance field that can get generated.

min_point_offset.description: The lowest possible value of random offset applied to each distribution point.

max_point_offset.description: The highest possible value of random offset applied to each distribution point.

max_radius.description: The maximum possible radius of the geode generated.

crack_point_offset.description: An offset applied to each distribution point that forms the geode crack opening.

generate_crack_chance.description: The likelihood of a geode generating with a crack in its shell.

base_crack_size.description: How large the crack opening of the geode should be when generated.

noise_multiplier.description: A multiplier applied to the noise that is applied to the distribution points within the geode.

use_potential_placements_chance.description: The likelihood that a special block will be placed on the inside of the geode.

use_alternate_layer0_chance.description: The likelihood that a block in the innermost layer will be replaced with an alternate option.

placements_require_layer0_alternate.description: If true, the potential placement block will only be placed on the alternate layer0 blocks.

invalid_blocks_threshold.description: The threshold of invalid blocks for a geode to have a distribution point before aborting generation.
